UsedTemplates.Name: galleryTemplate
UsedTemplates.Template:
<widget name="galleryTemplate" id="http://microsoft.com/appmagic/gallery" version="1.0" xmlns="http://openajax.org/metadata" xmlns:appMagic="http://schemas.microsoft.com/appMagic">
  <property name="TemplateSize" datatype="Number" defaultValue="160" />
  <property name="TemplatePadding" datatype="Number" defaultValue="2" />
  <appMagic:nestedWidgets></appMagic:nestedWidgets>
</widget>
